full_text:
Hu Ji (Weidu) 胡濟 (偉度)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Ji (胡濟), styledWeidu (偉度). Based in Hanshou, went to Chengdu to get help to repel Wei’s invasion. Hu Ji was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
